title: HTML Metadata and SEO Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags and attributes for making your HTML content discoverable.

questions.question: What is 'metadata' in the context of an HTML document?
options: Extra content shown at the bottom of the page.
Data about the data, used by browsers and search engines.
The actual text and images that users interact with.
A hidden script used to track user behavior.

questions.question: Where is metadata primarily stored in an HTML document?
options: At the very end of the document.

questions.question: Which meta tag specifies a short summary of the page often shown in search engine results?
What is the primary role of the 'robots' meta tag?
options: To automate form submission on the page.
To tell search engine crawlers whether to index the page.
To translate the page content into other languages.
To detect if the user is a human or a computer.

questions.question: Which attribute of a meta tag is used to specify Open Graph (OG) properties like 'og:title' or 'og:image'?
